{{Quote|This table was Taboon hardwood! Do you know how hard it is to get that in the Middle City?|A [[Besalisk/Legends|Besalisk]] businessman|<ref name="KOTOR1">[[Knights of the Old Republic 1|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 1]]</ref>}}
The '''Middle City''' was a level of the [[Taris/Legends|Tarisian]] world-city, between the [[Upper City]] and the [[Lower City]]. It was constructed a couple of centuries before the planet had become a major hub. Many small business owners lived here, and most average people came to the Middle City to conduct business. Swoops and air speeders traversed through the air-traffic ways that cut through the many avenues of the Middle City towers.

The Middle City was also the largest area, since a large portion of buildings were included in the jurisdiction of the "middle area". It was the fourth city to be built by the [[Taris Civil Authority]] which was above the [[Lower City]], [[Undercity (Taris)|Undercity]] and the [[Promised Land]] and eventually the [[Upper City]] was built above the Middle City. The most populous level of the planet, home to the lower and middle classes of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] population since the [[Tarisian Civil War]], though some [[Alien/Legends|Aliens]] did remain and were more there than those of the Upper City.

In [[3964 BBY]], following [[Zayne Carrick]]'s second escape from the [[Jedi Tower]], the Middle City was wracked by large-scale rioting. During the [[Taris Siege]], the Middle City was heavily bombarded by [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Kandosii-type dreadnaught|''Kandosii''-type dreadnaughts]]. Following the defeat of the Mandalorians at the [[Battle of Malachor V|Battle]] of [[Malachor V]], the Middle City went under a significant decline. By the time it was [[Capture of Taris|conquered]] by the Sith during the [[Jedi Civil War]], Taris's middle levels had become a ghost town. Or at the very least, it was on the brink of becoming one, where its local businesses were replaced with [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corperation]]. Czerka was also funding the [[Tarisian Tourism Board|famous]] [[Swoop/Legends|swoop racing]] [[Tarisian Season Opener|track]] in the [[Lower City|lower levels]].

Although not entirely devoid of crime, the Middle City was more notably peaceful than the other levels of Taris, though not to the extent of the Upper City.

The [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith]] presumably had patrols in the Middle City over the remainder of the middle-class population, during their occupation. As well as presumably both before and after the [[Mandalorian Wars|Mandolrian Wars]], being plagued by [[Exchange]] thugs. It is likely that most of the Middle City citizens perished in [[Destruction of Taris|Taris's destruction]].

By [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] the Middle City had been rebuilt by Human colonists, but never again had it become a place where only the middle- and lower-class Humans were allowed to live.
